name: feature.brand.agents
description: Brand & Guardrails feature agent pack (ADR 0155 / ADR 0014) — a manifest agent (the Brand Steward) whose tools are feature.brand.nodes over the ctx.features.brand surface. It explains a workspace's brand voice and audits content for compliance (banned phrases, formality, per-channel rules) from the AI chat. Tool-allowlisted to the Brand feature surface only.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Brand Steward
agents.description: Teaches and enforces a workspace's brand — voice, formality, approved + banned phrases, per-channel rules — and scores content for compliance, grounded via feature.brand.nodes over ctx.features.brand. Recommends; the human decides.
